description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a slightly tapered profile, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The exterior is finished in a rich, medium-brown wood grain, with horizontal slats on the front that visually separate each drawer. The sides and back are smooth, showcasing the natural wood pattern without any visible hardware or embellishments. The drawers appear to be handleless, relying on a push-to-open or groove mechanism for access. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall construction suggests a solid, well-crafted piece suitable for both residential and urban environments.
description: A modern, handleless chest of drawers with a rich brown wood finish and a tapered, slatted front. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with a smooth top and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted drawer faces and the tapered shape, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth wood grain and the tapering profile from top to bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the clean lines and wood texture.
